name: AntiBERTy
description: Optimize the affinity of your antibody or nanobody sequences from sequence alone. Use a language model trained on 500M+ natural antibody sequences.
capabilities: Optimize the affinity of your antibody or nanobody sequences from sequence alone
Use a language model trained on 500M+ natural antibody sequences

sequence.description: Antibody or nanobody amino acid sequence to optimize

numSequences.description: Number of optimized sequence variants to generate
